## 📱 Device Information
- Device: (e.g., Galaxy A52)
- Android Version: (e.g., Android 14)
- ROM / UI: (e.g., OneUI 6 / HyperOS)

## 🐛 Bug Description
Clearly describe what the issue is.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to ...
2. Tap on ...
3. Observe ...

## ⚠️ Expected Behavior
What should happen instead?

## 📸 Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or recordings.

## 🧩 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem.
